prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot provide financial advice or accurately predict future stock prices. Stock market movements are influenced by a multitude of unpredictable factors including company-specific news, economic data, geopolitical events, and overall market sentiment. This prediction is purely illustrative and generated based on a simplified financial model (geometric Brownian motion). It assumes a hypothetical average annualized volatility of 25% and a very slight daily positive drift (0.01%), extrapolated over 20 trading days from the current price of $150.27. The confidence intervals represent the range within which the price might fall under these hypothetical statistical assumptions, but do not reflect real-world predictive power. Actual price movements could fall well outside these ranges due to unforeseen circumstances.
